channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Can the pavement around this tree pit be inspected please?, 23rd March
item.description:
Please inspect the pavement around the tree and tree pit

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woldham Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Van, 23rd March
item.description:
With broken window. Has been there for around a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead

item.title: Street litter bin full, 23rd March
item.description:
One bin near by removed. Bin on Z Dallin Rd now full again
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dallin Road, Plumstead

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd March
item.description:
Usual Favourite Fly Tipper! This time no bags just rubble and bricks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plum Lane, Plumstead

item.description:
New Kent Road westbound at entrance to Balfour St. Reported about a month ago and still noisy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Manhole cover rocking and noisy, 23rd March
item.description:
New Kent Road, eastbound, just east of Bartholomew St. Reported a month ago and still noisy. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 197-209, New Kent Road, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Can pavement be inspected at 31 Woldham?, 23rd March
item.description:
Tree roots making this pavement difficult to navigate for some. Can it be inspected and made smoother?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woldham Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can pavement and road surface be inspected here?, 23rd March
item.description:
Tree roots affecting pavement and road surface here. Could this be inspected and resurfaced if necessary?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Danger as Streatham hill roadworks, 22nd March
item.description:
Massive congestion on this small residential road. The mismanaged non signed major works on Streatham hill mean cars are being forced up these narrow roads and tonight it was highly dangerous and congested. Massive vans and a lorry in these small roads. The roundabout was a death trap as drivers did not know what way to go, no signs at all closing roads on Streatham hill and so no one knew where to go. This small road and roundabout is dangerous, far too small roads in such a congested small residential area. Chaos. Utter chaos tonight. I feel sorry for the residential residents of these back roads.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wavertree Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two bin bags, 22nd March
item.description:
Garden rubbish maybe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping, 22nd March
item.description:
More flying tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (next to car wash)-flytipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Boxes of rubbish flytipped here and needs removal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish pouring onto footpath constantly, 22nd March
item.description:
The rubbish in the front garden pouring onto the footpath is constant and is very hazardous for pedestrians.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Julian's Farm Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive amounts of rubbish outside 20 & 22 Saunders Road, 22nd March
item.description:
Excessive amounts of rubbish outside numbers 20 and 22 Saunders Road. Landlords should be held accountable as they are not taking responsibility for their tenants, and residents seem to think that this is acceptable, or hope that it will magically disappear. (And it kind of does, because eventually someone will report it and it hopefully gets cleared!)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Saunders Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (next to car wash near Marks and Spencer storage)-Flytipping-3rd Complaint, 22nd March
item.description:
3rd Complaint: A chair dumped, where furniture should be appropriately disposed of. It is completely unacceptable that this is a site for dumping of rubbish and nothing is being done about the removal of it, which will encourage more flytipping. The Duty of Care is not being demonstrated of not enforcing the law in regards to the responsible manner of rubbish disposal/removal. This sends a message that this conduct has no accountability. Health and safety of the residents and wider community should be paramount, not ignored.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Between 4.30 - 10.30 pm today, bags of rubbish and loose rubbish have been dumped on the pavement by the bins. When this happens, foxes spread the rubbish along the New River creating litter and hazards to the wildlife.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whittington Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area around roundabout and under A2 Bridge - full of litter & fly-tipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Hi there, The area next to the round requires regular cleaning. Please ensure sweeping is done twice a week at least. It's in a pretty bad state atm - please arrange cleaning. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aldeburgh Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area full of litter, 22nd March
item.description:
Hi there, The area next to the Car MOT is full of fly-tipping - please clean it and keep monitoring it. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aldeburgh Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping next to Alan's Plants, 22nd March
item.description:
Hi there, This area keeps having lots of litter - fly-tipping spot. Please clean it and keep monitoring it regularly. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dupree Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal encampment of Vans parked on Rowanwood Ave, 22nd March
item.description:
4 vans parked on the road for weeks being slept in, using bushes to relieve themselves and dump rubbish in conservation area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Rowanwood Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
